name: Generic Engine & Baselines
description: Archetype-agnostic auto-role pilots that form the lineage backbone, including the main.py decision engine (fan-in 4) and its v1/v2 iterations plus bare and bench baselines that every other pilot descends from.

name: Crustle / Typhlosion Line
description: Dual-line Crustle/Typhlosion deck pilots derived from main and main_v2, representing the strongest gauntlet engine in the lineage.

name: Buddy Blast Damage-Correction Series (v3-v4)
description: The ablation series branching off main_v2 that layers in the Buddy Blast real-damage correction, including the v3 base, v4 extension, and the mirror-neutral v3_pure isolate.

name: Honchkrow Combo
description: Combo-aware Honchkrow pilots with precise ammo-discard logic; main_honch_base feeds back into the v1 lineage via the related chain.

name: Fire Counter Deck
description: Anti-Crustle Fire aggro counter pilots that combine the crustle base and bare baseline lineages to exploit the all-Grass Fire weakness.

name: Mega Lucario (Legacy)
description: Legacy Mega Lucario backup pilot retained as a historical baseline branch off main.py.

name: Package & Tooling
description: Package marker and tooling configuration that scaffold the agents package without participating in pilot strategy.
